title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Cognizant
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
